steps.title: Identify what emphasizing a number requires
steps.content: To emphasize orthoclase's Mohs scale number effectively, the student must state the number explicitly and demonstrate what it means in context.

steps.title: Find which choice accomplishes this
steps.content:
B states orthoclase's number (6) and immediately shows its meaning by comparing it to fluorite (4) and corundum (9), revealing its position on the scale.

  • A omits orthoclase
  • C mentions orthoclase but not its number
  • D emphasizes corundum instead
.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
